prompt: A rectangular park has a perimeter of 480 meters. The length of the park is three times its width. A specific section, representing 1/6 of the total park area, is designated for a new flower bed project. Gardeners can prepare the soil for this flower bed at a rate of 2.5 square meters per hour. If a team of 3 gardeners works together for 6 hours each day, how many full days will it take them to prepare the entire designated flower bed area?
